message:
style(raptorq): remove unused variable and use inline format strings in tests

Minor cleanup in the corrupted-repair-symbol decoder tests:
- Remove unused `tampered_esi` binding (the variable was needed by the
  old strict pattern match on CorruptDecodedOutput{esi, byte_index: 0},
  but commit 8fba4b58 broadened the assertion to accept either
  SingularMatrix or CorruptDecodedOutput without field matching, leaving
  `tampered_esi` dead)
- Use Rust 2021 inline format syntax (`{err:?}`) instead of the
  positional `{:?}", err` form for consistency with project style
- Reformat trailing comma placement in multi-line assert! to satisfy
  rustfmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
